Class DaoUtils

java.lang.Object
iu.dao.DaoUtils
final class DaoUtils extends Object
Internal utility methods used across the DAO implementation layer.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    (package private) static boolean
    appendCorrelation(StringBuilder sb, String outerAlias, String subAlias, Iterable<String> idColumnNames)
    Appends correlated subAlias.col = outerAlias.col predicates for each column name, joined by AND.
    (package private) static void
    appendOrderBy(StringBuilder sb, Iterable<String> order)
    Appends an ORDER BY clause to an existing SQL StringBuilder.

    Returns the boxed wrapper type for a primitive class, or the class itself for non-primitive types.

    Builds a WHERE clause from an ordered sequence of SQL predicates.

    Converts a camelCase identifier to UPPER_SNAKE_CASE.

    Generates a short alphabetic SQL table alias for a zero-based index.

    singleQuoted(String value)
    Wraps a string value in SQL single quotes, escaping any embedded single quotes by doubling them.

    Methods inherited from class Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Method Details

    • singleQuoted

      static String singleQuoted(String value)
      Wraps a string value in SQL single quotes, escaping any embedded single quotes by doubling them.

      Example: singleQuoted("it's") → "'it''s'".

      Parameters:
      value - string to quote; must not be null
      Returns:
      SQL single-quoted string literal

    • literalFromDate

      static String literalFromDate(Date date)
      Formats a Date value as a SQL TIMESTAMP literal.

      The returned string has the form TIMESTAMP 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSS' using Locale.ROOT so that the output is locale-independent.

      Parameters:
      date - date/time value; must not be null
      Returns:
      SQL TIMESTAMP literal string

    • camelToSnakeUpper

      static String camelToSnakeUpper(String name)
      Converts a camelCase identifier to UPPER_SNAKE_CASE.

      Example: "myColumnName" → "MY_COLUMN_NAME".

      Parameters:
      name - camelCase name; must not be null
      Returns:
      UPPER_SNAKE_CASE equivalent

    • qualifyName

      static String qualifyName(String schema, String name)
      Returns a schema-qualified name when a schema is present, otherwise returns the bare name.
      Parameters:
      schema - schema name; may be null or blank
      name - table or object name; must not be null
      Returns:
      schema.name if schema has a value, otherwise name

    • normalizeName

      static String normalizeName(String value)
      Normalizes a database object name to a trimmed, uppercase string.

      Returns an empty string for null input.

      Parameters:
      value - raw name; may be null
      Returns:
      trimmed uppercase name, or "" if value is null

    • hasValue

      static boolean hasValue(String value)
      Returns true if the given string is non-null and contains at least one non-whitespace character.
      Parameters:
      value - string to test; may be null
      Returns:
      true when value is present

    • getFingerprint

      static long getFingerprint(Iterable<?>... values)
      Computes a stable 64-bit fingerprint over one or more ordered sequences of values.

      The fingerprint is sensitive to both element identity (via Object.hashCode()) and element count within each iterable, making it suitable for cache-key generation. null elements contribute 0. null iterables contribute only their zero count.

      Parameters:
      values - zero or more iterables whose contents form the fingerprint
      Returns:
      a 64-bit fingerprint value, 0L when values is null

    • getAlias

      static String getAlias(int i)
      Generates a short alphabetic SQL table alias for a zero-based index.

      Index 0 → "a", 1 → "b", …, 25 → "z", 26 → "ba", etc.

      Parameters:
      i - zero-based alias index
      Returns:
      one or more lowercase letters identifying the alias

    • getAllBeanProperties

      static Iterable<PropertyDescriptor> getAllBeanProperties(Class<?> entityClass)
      Returns all readable bean properties for an entity class and its full superclass hierarchy (excluding Object).

      Properties are collected from the top of the hierarchy downward so that subclass overrides shadow superclass definitions. The class property is always excluded. Only properties with a getter are included.

      Parameters:
      entityClass - entity class; must not be null
      Returns:
      ordered list of readable property descriptors

    • getAnnotationFromHierarchy

      static <A extends Annotation> A getAnnotationFromHierarchy(Class<?> c, Class<A> ann)
      Searches c and each of its superclasses for the given annotation, returning the first match found.
      Type Parameters:
      A - annotation type
      Parameters:
      c - class to search; must not be null
      ann - annotation type to look for; must not be null
      Returns:
      the annotation instance, or null if not found in the hierarchy

    • getPropertyValue

      static Object getPropertyValue(Object bean, PropertyDescriptor prop)
      Reads the value of a bean property by invoking its getter reflectively.
      Parameters:
      bean - bean instance; must not be null
      prop - descriptor for the property to read; must have a readable getter
      Returns:
      the property value, possibly null
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the getter throws or is inaccessible

    • autobox

      static Class<?> autobox(Class<?> c)
      Returns the boxed wrapper type for a primitive class, or the class itself for non-primitive types.

      Supported primitives: boolean, byte, short, int, long, float, double, char.

      Parameters:
      c - class to autobox; must not be null
      Returns:
      corresponding wrapper type, or c unchanged if not primitive

    • findProperty

      static PropertyDescriptor findProperty(Class<?> entityClass, String propertyName)
      Finds a named bean property on an entity class (or its superclasses).
      Parameters:
      entityClass - class to search; must not be null
      propertyName - exact property name to locate
      Returns:
      the matching PropertyDescriptor
      Throws:
      NoSuchElementException - if no readable property with that name exists

    • getSqlType

      static Class<?> getSqlType(Class<?> entityClass, String prop)
      Determines the JDBC-compatible Java type to use for a named property when binding SQL parameters or reading result sets.

      When the property's getter carries a Column annotation with a non-blank columnDefinition, the SQL type keyword is inspected:

      • Contains CHAR → String
      • Starts with INT → Long
      • Starts with NUMBER, NUMERIC, or DECIMAL → Number
      • Equals DATE → Date
      • Equals TIME → Time
      • Equals or contains TIMESTAMP or equals DATETIME → Timestamp
      • Equals CLOB or TEXT → char[]
      • Anything else → Object

      When no column definition is present, the property type is returned after autoboxing any primitive via autobox(Class).

      Parameters:
      entityClass - entity class owning the property; must not be null
      prop - property name; must exist on the entity class
      Returns:
      Java type to use for the SQL column
      Throws:
      NoSuchElementException - if the property is not found

    • isTransient

      static boolean isTransient(PropertyDescriptor property)
      Determines if Transient is present on a property's read method.
      Parameters:
      property - PropertyDescriptor
      Returns:
      true if property is non-null, has a non-null read method, and Transient is present on the read method

    • joinKeyword

      static String joinKeyword(edu.iu.dao.SqlJoinType.Type joinType)
      Returns the SQL JOIN keyword for the given join type.
      Parameters:
      joinType - join type; must not be null
      Returns:
      SQL join keyword string (e.g. "JOIN", "LEFT OUTER JOIN")

    • buildWhere

      static String buildWhere(Iterable<String> criteria)
      Builds a WHERE clause from an ordered sequence of SQL predicates.

      null elements in criteria are silently skipped. Returns an empty string when all predicates are null or the iterable is empty.

      Parameters:
      criteria - SQL predicate strings; null elements are skipped
      Returns:
      "\nWHERE pred1\n AND pred2 ...", or "" if empty

    • appendOrderBy

      static void appendOrderBy(StringBuilder sb, Iterable<String> order)
      Appends an ORDER BY clause to an existing SQL StringBuilder.

      Does nothing when order is empty.

      Parameters:
      sb - target StringBuilder containing the SQL built so far
      order - order expressions to append; no-op when empty

    • idCriteria

      static Iterable<String> idCriteria(String alias, Iterable<ColumnMetaData> idColumns, String placeholder)
      Builds a lazy iterable of alias.columnName = placeholder predicates for each ID column, for use in a WHERE clause with a table alias.
      Parameters:
      alias - table alias prefix for the column reference
      idColumns - ID column metadata
      placeholder - SQL parameter placeholder (e.g. "?")
      Returns:
      lazy iterable of SQL equality predicates

    • idCriteria

      static Iterable<String> idCriteria(Iterable<ColumnMetaData> idColumns, String placeholder)
      Builds a lazy iterable of columnName = placeholder predicates for each ID column (no alias prefix), for use in an UPDATE … WHERE clause.
      Parameters:
      idColumns - ID column metadata
      placeholder - SQL parameter placeholder (e.g. "?")
      Returns:
      lazy iterable of SQL equality predicates

    • getInCriteria

      static String getInCriteria(String leftHandSide, Iterable<String> matchCriteria)
      Builds a leftHandSide IN (v1, v2, ...) SQL expression.
      Parameters:
      leftHandSide - left-hand side of the IN expression (e.g. "a.COLUMN_NAME")
      matchCriteria - values to include in the IN list
      Returns:
      the complete IN expression as a string

    • appendCorrelation

      static boolean appendCorrelation(StringBuilder sb, String outerAlias, String subAlias, Iterable<String> idColumnNames)
      Appends correlated subAlias.col = outerAlias.col predicates for each column name, joined by AND.

      When idColumnNames is empty the buffer is unchanged and false is returned.

      Parameters:
      sb - target StringBuilder
      outerAlias - alias of the outer query's table reference
      subAlias - alias of the correlated subquery's table reference
      idColumnNames - column names to correlate
      Returns:
      true if at least one predicate was appended
